productDisplayName: Puma Women Cell Exsis Silver Black White Shoe
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during training with these Cell Exsis shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you to help you train better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper AirMesh upper for superior breathability Synthetic overlays for better structure Lace-ups for snug Fit puma formstripe and Puma jumping cat logo on the sides for comfort and style Cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Midsole Midsole with ArchTec technology to stabilize the midfoot Outsole ArchTec on outsole to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Long-lasting CELL unit in the heel for improved shock absorption Outsole made of high abrasion resistant material that provides durability in high-wear areas Multi-directional pattern outsole with flex grooves for more flexibility to the feet
